windows.label: main
windows.title: Filthy Net Deck — MTG Arena Companion

security.csp: default-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' https://api.scryfall.com https://*.scryfall.io https://cards.scryfall.io https://filthy-net-deck.netlify.app; img-src 'self' data: blob: asset: https://asset.localhost https://api.scryfall.com https://*.scryfall.io https://cards.scryfall.io https://c1.scryfall.com https://c2.scryfall.com https://*.netlify.app; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self'; frame-src https://www.mtggoldfish.com https://melee.gg https://mtga.untapped.gg https://*.netlify.app

bundle.shortDescription: Daily Standard & Pioneer meta decks — filthy netdecks, zero shame
bundle.longDescription: Filthy Net Deck is a desktop meta companion for Magic: The Gathering. The daily Standard and Pioneer metagame — real ranked lists only, every card verified on Scryfall. Bo1/Bo3, tiers, card art, Arena import, and tournament pulse.
